builderStatic.notes: Reuse shared builder-static Carrd canon until the live Builder itself is re-verified.

templateInstance.notes: Canonical Builder scan, DOM audit, tabs map, live plugin inventory, published-site inventory, and repo sync diff are captured. Plugin/theme embeds were updated to v2 in the Builder draft and verified by exact hash readback. Published page still needs operator publish and post-publish scan.

reason: Builder-side scan package exists and v2 plugin refresh is verified in draft. Full status is blocked until operator publish and post-publish verification.
requiredArtifacts: published site plugin scan before publish
repo-vs-template plugin sync diff for Builder draft
freshScanRequiredWhen: active Builder URL changes for this site package
plugin sync or deterministic audit is requested
meaningful template or plugin changes happen after the latest scan
